programme.title: Taken In Montana
programme.desc: (M) When her parents go missing during a family vacation, a teen tries to put the clues together to find them -- but she may be trusting the wrong people for help.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: (M) When model Kara gets disturbing messages from a fan, cyber influencer Cody comes to her aid. But when the stalker begins to show up in person, 'IRL' takes on a whole new meaning.

programme.title: Forever Christmas
programme.desc: (PG) Workaholic reality TV producer Sophie is tasked with a holiday show about Will, a sexy guy who celebrates Christmas year-round, and soon finds herself falling for him.

programme.title: Christmas In Alaska
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
